pi_items.source: Verified from setup_artifactory.sh download URL and Maven Central.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires downloading the real 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' artifact, which originates from Maven Central (group_id: org.apache.commons, artifact_id: commons-lang3, version: 3.14.0). The artifact is sourced from '/home/ga/artifacts/commons-lang3/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar', deployed to the local Artifactory repository 'example-repo-local', and the user is expected to download it to '/home/ga/Downloads/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. All these details are verified from the setup scripts and actual Maven Central metadata.
